meta.description: End-to-end learner journey verification matrix for alpha 004

steps.name: Onboarding
steps.expected_result: User can select target language, native language, goal, duration, and level. Profile created in backend.
steps.actual_result: Onboarding screen renders with 4 steps. Language selection, native language, preferences, and level selection all functional. Registration and profile creation work via API.

steps.name: Learner Profile
steps.expected_result: Learner profile created with target_language, native_language, goal, duration, level.
steps.actual_result: Profile created with all specified fields. Profile status 'created'. User ID matches auth header.
steps.evidence: Profile create response: status='created', user_id matches

steps.name: Diagnostic
steps.expected_result: Diagnostic session created, 4 responses submitted, session completed with CEFR assessment.
steps.actual_result: Session created IN_PROGRESS. 4 responses submitted (grammar_recognition, active_vocabulary, written_production, narrative_coherence). Completed with COMPLETED status and A1 overall level.
steps.evidence: Session: IN_PROGRESS → COMPLETED. Assessments: 4 skills with CEFR levels.

steps.name: Learning Entry Contract
steps.expected_result: Contract created with diagnostic-driven parameters (target_language, duration, scaffolding, vocabulary budget).
steps.actual_result: Contract created with target_language='Spanish', support_language='English', lesson_duration_minutes=10, scaffolding_mode='high', version='1.0.0'. Diagnostic snapshot included.
steps.evidence: Contract response with all 9 required fields. snapshot: assessments with CEFR.

steps.name: Home
steps.expected_result: Home dashboard shows learning plan card, mastery progress, and lesson CTA.
steps.actual_result: Home screen renders with learning plan card (if contract exists) and Start Lesson CTA. Loading state shows if API unavailable.
steps.evidence: Screen code confirms contract query, mastery query, lesson card with CTA.
issues: Home loading state has no timeout — hangs indefinitely if API unavailable

steps.name: Lesson Start
steps.expected_result: Lesson session created with ACTIVE status and loaded lesson definition.
steps.actual_result: Lesson session created with id=00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000010, status=ACTIVE, current_attempt=0.

steps.name: Lesson Session
steps.expected_result: Lesson session screen shows communicative goal, task, grammar/vocabulary focus, and text input.
steps.actual_result: Lesson screen renders with 'My Morning with My Pet' title, communicative goal, task description, grammar focus chips, key vocabulary chips, and multiline text input.
steps.evidence: Screen code review confirms all elements present.

steps.name: Text Submission
steps.expected_result: Submission created with RECEIVED status, linked to session. Minimum 10 chars enforced.
steps.actual_result: Submission created with RECEIVED status, session_id and user_id verified. Duplicate submission protection via X-Idempotency-Key works.
steps.evidence: Submission response: status=RECEIVED, text_preview shows truncated text. Idempotent on same key.

steps.name: Mock AI Analysis
steps.expected_result: Deterministic mock analysis based on text content. No real LLM calls.
steps.actual_result: Mock AI analysis uses deterministic fixtures (cat_pet for pet-related text, morning_routine for morning text, generic fallback). Malformed mode returns INVALID_OUTPUT.
steps.evidence: Code review: mock AI services use dict fixtures, no external API calls. mock_ai_enabled=true.

steps.name: Validation Result
steps.expected_result: Linguistic and pedagogical validation pass. Processing pipeline completes.
steps.actual_result: Validation pipeline: linguistic check passed (6 checks), pedagogical check passed (no mastery claim/reward command). Decision: COMPLETE.
steps.evidence: Process response: status=COMPLETED, decision=COMPLETE. Validation results show checks passed.

steps.name: Correction/Feedback State
steps.expected_result: Result screen shows corrections with severity, suggestion, and improved phrasing.
steps.actual_result: Result screen renders strengths (sequence, time markers), corrections (VERB_FORM major, PREPOSITION minor), suggested improved phrasing.
steps.evidence: Screen code confirms all correction fields rendered with severity badges.

steps.name: Deterministic Lesson Completion
steps.expected_result: Lesson session transitions to COMPLETED state deterministically.
steps.actual_result: Session transitions: ACTIVE → SUBMITTED → ANALYSIS_PENDING → ANALYSIS_VALIDATED → COMPLETED (via process_lesson_session). State machine enforces valid transitions.
steps.evidence: Lesson session query: status=COMPLETED. State machine tests all pass.

steps.name: Mastery Evidence
steps.expected_result: Mastery evidence recorded for written_production skill at guided_use level.
steps.actual_result: Mastery evidence created: skill=written_production, type=guided_use, status=RECORDED.
steps.evidence: Mastery evidence response: status=RECORDED. Mastery profile shows records and recent_evidence.

steps.name: Audit Event
steps.expected_result: Audit events recorded for diagnostic start/complete and lesson completion.
steps.actual_result: Audit events recorded: DIAGNOSTIC_STARTED, DIAGNOSTIC_COMPLETED, LESSON_COMPLETED. (FIXED: was previously not recording)
steps.evidence: DB query: 3 audit events found with correct event_types and timestamps.

steps.name: Result Screen
steps.expected_result: Result screen shows completion status, strengths, corrections, validation results, and mastery progress.
steps.actual_result: Result screen renders: completion status (green check), strengths, corrections, improved phrasing, validation rows, mastery progress, and 'Back to Home' CTA.
steps.evidence: Screen code review confirms all sections rendered. Incomplete lesson shows warning.
issues: Result loading state has no timeout fallback

steps.name: Return to Home
steps.expected_result: Back to Home navigates to home dashboard with updated state.
steps.actual_result: 'Back to Home' button triggers router.replace('/home'). Home shows updated profile state.
steps.evidence: Screen code confirms router.replace('/home') on press.
